extraction.concerns: CRITICAL for coordinator/dedup: This partition contains ONLY the alert+recommendation payload CATALOGS, abstract data schemas, celery tasks, and facade wiring. The predicate logic that actually evaluates patient data and SETS each criterio_N flag lives in trilha_automatica/models/trilhaN.py and trilha_automatica/models/trilhas_v3/* (OUTSIDE BE-01). The numeric thresholds I captured are the trigger DEFINITIONS as encoded verbatim in each criterion's alert label / recommendation text; the actual comparison operators are executed in that out-of-scope model layer. Another partition owning trilha_automatica/models MUST be cross-referenced to confirm operator directions and to avoid double-counting these thresholds. Also: three sepse variants coexist with DIFFERENT thresholds (v3 explicit: CVC>=7d, femoral>=5d, TAX>=38.2, lactato>=3mmol/L; variant B: SOFA>6, lactato>2.5mg/dl, 30ml/kg, femoral>7d, device>10d; variant A: Meropenem 1g + fixed 1500ml bolus) — captured as separate rules (RULE-sepse-BE-01-001/002/003) needing reconciliation. Duplicate-payload hazards flagged: trilha_eficiencia.py holds a module dict that is actually SEDATION content (duplicates trilha_sedacao) while only its get_ fn is the real efficiency payload; sedacao/profilaxia also have dual v1/v3 variants where facade selects specific ones (RULE-config-BE-01-021). Heparin frequency internal inconsistency in profilaxia (8/8h vs 12/12h for same renal condition). Potassium unit written as mg/dl in hyperkalemia protocol (should be mEq/L). Noradrenaline escalation threshold unit differs mcg/kg/min (estabilidade v3) vs mcg/kg/h (estabilizacao). Note: I intentionally consolidated ~200 individual criterio entries into per-trilha catalog rules plus focused quantitative sub-rules to stay reimplementable; a verifier can expand any catalog from the cited source lines.
highlights: RULE-sepse-BE-01-001: sepse v3 full 20-threshold table (TAX>=38.2, FR>20, PAS<90|PAM<60, TEC>3s, lactato>=3mmol/L, diurese<=0.5ml/kg/h, GCS<14, bili>2, TAX<36, FC>100, PCO2<32|P/F<300, plaq<150k, CVC>=7d, femoral>=5d, cir.abdominal<20d)
RULE-piora-BE-01-004: graded deterioration severity map (2+/2-/3+/3-) with TAX bands 38-38.2/>38.2/<35 and PAS bands 81-99/150-189/<80/>189 -> moderate vs high risk
RULE-estabilidade-BE-01-012: vasopressor ladder nora>0.5mcg/kg/min -> hidrocortisona 50mg 6/6h + vasopressina 6ml/h; nora>1.5 -> adrenalina; dobutamina stop if FC>130

RULE-equilibrio-BE-01-010: severe hyperkalemia K>6 rescue (gluconato Ca 1amp, furosemida 20mg x3, polarizante, fenoterol/salbutamol 10gtt x3 q15min; recheck 4h, if K>5.5 add bicarb 1ml/kg 8.4% + Sorcal 15g 8/8h)
RULE-profilaxia-BE-01-005: VTE dosing enoxaparina 40mg 1x/d; creat>2.0|TRS -> heparina 5000U (8/8h c4 vs 12/12h c5 - internal discrepancy); IMC>40 -> enoxaparina 60mg
RULE-profilaxia-BE-01-006: insulin NPH 0.3-0.5U/kg/d /3 + 1U regular per 50mg/dl HGT above 150mg/dl
RULE-sedacao-BE-01-015: analgesia ladder Morfina 2mg EV titrate to max 10mg; if refractory or creat>2.5 -> Fentanil 2ml/h(50mcg/h); RASS<=-2 target; propofol>4d PRIS; TRE FR>22
RULE-ventilacao-BE-01-018: VC 4ml/kg ideal wt; P/F<150 PEEPxFiO2 high; TOT>10d (COVID>14d) -> traqueostomia; PRONA 16-20h RASS -4 to -5; SatO2>96% de-escalate O2; DPOC target 88-92%
RULE-nutricao-BE-01-017: VRG>500ml/6h interrupt 2h; diarrhea >=5 evac or >=3 liquid/24h; feeding contraindicated if noradrenaline>30ml/h(=0.05mcg/kg/min); GI-bleed transfuse only Hb<7 AND plaq<150k
RULE-eficiencia-BE-01-016: transfusion restriction Hb>=7 (RBC), Hb>6 (2nd unit), platelets>25000; file also mislabels a sedation dict as eficiencia

RULE-antimicrobiano-BE-01-019: same abx>7d suspend; short-spectrum + internacao>48h escalate; fever>38.3 + CVC>7d remove; PAC PCR<100 or COVID -> suspend; no renal adj for Polimixina B/Linezolida/Oxacilina/Tigeciclina/Clindamicina
RULE-glosa-BE-01-020: billing timing - med-check >1h/>2h, signature >1h AND <6h, VM filter <72h, daytime note by 14h/within 12h shift, abx-parecer emphasis if >7d

SEPSE interactive protocol: 7-item bundle split into 'primeira_hora' (labs, antimicrobial escalation, volume expansion) and 'reavaliacao' (labs, hemodynamics, devices, vasopressors) [trilha_interativa_sepse serializer]

Vasopressor escalation thresholds (verbatim clinical text): noradrenaline >0.3 mcg/kg/min -> add vasopressin + hydrocortisone 50mg IV q6h; >1 mcg/kg/min or shock index HR/SBP >0.7 -> switch to epinephrine
Volume resuscitation: 30 ml/kg Ringer Lactate (500ml/5min bolus) on hypotension/hypoperfusion (lactate >30 mg/dl, TEC >3s, diuresis <0.5 ml/kg/h/6h); 20 ml/kg if cardiac dysfunction/oligo-anuric AKI
Reassessment thresholds: dobutamine if lactate rising OR TEC>3s OR SVcO2<60 OR deltaPCO2>6; Hb transfusion target >7; RASS -2 sedation target on intubation; CVC replacement if >7 days
Alert-color state machine on TrilhaSepseV3: accept=LARANJA, reject/close=NEUTRO+assistido, all-items-checked completion=null alert+assistido (forces aceito=False)
Care-pathway criteria-count catalog: trilha1 Sedacao=12, 2 Estabilizacao=6, 3 Ventilacao=10, 4 SEPSE=10, 5 Antimicrobiano=14, 6 Nutricao=10, 7 Equilibrio=10, 8 Profilaxias=11, 9 GlosaZero=16
Bed classification: HOME CARE iff cd_tipo_leito==3 AND ds_tipo_leito=='HOME CARE' -> homecare tenant; else automatica/'americashealth' tenant
AMBIGUOUS: test/temp bed exclusion uses single exclude() = AND of 3 icontains tokens, so most real test beds are NOT excluded (likely intended OR)
DISCREPANCY: SEPSE rejection branch dereferences unset horario_registro_aceitacao (None.astimezone()) -> likely AttributeError, unlike accept/close branches
DISCREPANCY/duplication: indicadores_assistenciais vs indicadores_controle_Infeccao diverge on sedation (taxa_uso_sedacao*100 vs raw dias_sedacao) and mortality field names despite identical labels
TLP indicator = letalidade_tlp * 100 (fraction->percent); incremental ETL uses dt_referencia >= watermark (boundary row reprocessed); macro indicators load current month only
Authz: rejecting/closing SEPSE protocol requires 'can_recusar_protocolo_sepse'; item checker auto-attributed to request.user; history-skip when only non-substantive fields dirty
extraction.concerns: Key clinical logic (per-criterion scoring for the 9 pathways) lives in utils.novo_etl_schema and core.utils (enviar_observacao_trilha_interativa, checagem_envio_automatico) which are OUTSIDE partition BE-02 — the criteria COUNTS are captured here but the actual criterion definitions/formulas must be extracted from whatever partition owns `utils/` and `core/utils`. RULE-etl-BE-02-004 (indicator watermark ETL) is duplicated verbatim in both indicadores.py and trilha1.py. The two indicator viewsets (assistenciais / controle_Infeccao) are near-copies with drifted field names — a verifier should confirm which field set (tx_mortalidade_observada vs tx_mortalidade, taxa_uso_sedacao*100 vs dias_sedacao) is canonical against the IndicadoresAssistenciais model. SEPSE clinical thresholds (lactate in mg/dl not mmol/L, Hb target 'mg/dl', shock index >0.7) are recorded verbatim, not corrected. The interactive SEPSE feature references TrilhaSepseV3Model/TrilhaInterativaSpese which live in trilha_automatica/models (not in this partition).

highlights: SEPSE v3 alert (RULE-sepse-BE-03-100): maiores(criterio_1..11)>=3 OR menores(criterio_12..20)>=4 => VERMELHO; >=2 OR >=3 => AMARELO. DISCREPANCY vs v1 which used AND (RULE-sepse-BE-03-014, maiores>=3 AND menores>=4).

Systemic defect RULE-systemic-BE-03-001: every diagnosis-list check uses vars(obj).fromkeys((field names)) which iterates field-name KEYS (values all None), so presence-of-diagnosis gates are unsatisfiable and absence gates vacuously true across sepse c8/c9/c10, estabilidade c13, eficiencia c3/c4/c5/c6/c7, profilaxia c1.
SEPSE v3 criterio_1 and criterio_3 omit the documented 'ausencia de noradrenalina' negation (code uses qt_vol_nora__gt=0 presence) - DISCREPANCY.
SEPSE v3 criterio_8 oliguria: peso parsed via re.findall(\d+) then join STRIPS the decimal separator, inflating weight ~10x and understating mL/kg/h; threshold <0.5 mL/kg/h over diurese/12/peso.
Sedacao v3 infusion thresholds (criterio_1): midazolam>=15, propofol>=20, fentanil>=15, cetamina>=15, dexmedetomidina>=15 ml/h in 4h (refactored from mid>10/pro>16/fen>15/cet>10/precedex>14).
Sedacao v3 pain scales: criterio_7 VISUAL 4-6 / BPS 7-9 (AMARELO), criterio_8 VISUAL 7-10 / BPS 10-12 (VERMELHO), both required in two consecutive balances.
Sedacao v3 criterio_9 RASS bound reversed (-3<=x<=-5 unsatisfiable) and criterio_12 uses impossible thresholds fio2>250 / fr>250 with inverted drug clause - DISCREPANCY (both unwired).
Estabilidade v3 criterio_7 (VERMELHO, wired): noradrenalina>20ml/h in 4h AND (no vasopressina OR no hidrocortisona); criterio_12/13 use AND for PAS/PAD vs documented OR and count==2 exact.
Eficiencia v3 criterio_5 (VERMELHO): platelet value read from ultima_cpoe.diurna_plaquetas which does not exist on CPOE model -> always 0 -> >25000 never fires; 4h window mistakenly set to 6h.
Eficiencia v3 criterio_7 has runtime bug range[1,5] (range not subscriptable) crashing the RASS branch; criterio_3 Hb>=7 defeated by operator precedence (hemoglobina or 0>=7).

Sepsis interactive bundle (SSC 1h): overdue at >1h (primeira_hora) / >3h (reavaliacao); reassessment items hidden until 2h; can_criar_novo_protocolo gated by 3-day cooldown + alert!=NEUTRO + not assistido; can_recusar_protocolo_sepse permission.
Alert-color engine define_tipo_alerta (external util) with per-model _CRITERIOS_ALERTA thresholds {amarelo:2/vermelho:3}, {3/4}, {4/5}; NEUTRO resets assistido=False in most (not all) save() paths.
extraction.concerns: Many v3 criterion methods are DEFINED but NOT wired into calcular_criterios (only a small subset is computed per trilha): SEDACAO computes only c1,c5,c7,c8 (of 12); ESTABILIDADE only c7,c10,c12,c13 (of 13); EFICIENCIA only c3,c5,c10 (of 10); PROFILAXIA only c1,c9 (c2-c8 fully commented out). SEPSE v3 computes all 20. I recorded unwired methods as separate rules (flagged in notes) since they encode intended domain logic and may be reactivated. Cross-partition dependencies OUT of BE-03 scope that a verifier/reconciler needs: define_tipo_alerta and get_ventilacao live in trilha_automatica/utils.py; get_number and diferenca_dias in utils/handlers.py; the payload_* recommendation dicts in trilha_automatica/facade and core/facade/*; get_ventilacao string lists (lowercased Portuguese, with typos like 'espontnaea') materially affect ventilation-mode matching. Version variants captured as SEPARATE cross-referenced rules: v1 (trilha1-9, *Model + *Sintetico + *Tasy) vs v3 (trilhas_v3/*). Sepse alert semantics changed AND->OR between v1 and v3. Numerous docstring-vs-code inversions recorded VERBATIM as DISCREPANCY (never corrected). CharField numeric columns (diurna_plaquetas, tempo_enchimento_capilar, diurna_bicabornato) are compared with __lt/__gt at DB level - backend-dependent lexical-vs-numeric risk noted per rule.

highlights: RULE-sofa-BE-04-038: SOFA score input set = fio2, po2, plaquetas, bilirrubinas, pam, dobutamina, glasgow, debito_urinario_24h, creatinina + noradrenalina.quantidade (added only if a noradrenalina record exists); actual point math lives in trilha_manual SOFA model (out of partition)
RULE-alerta-BE-04-013: bed alert = interactive sepse LARANJA overrides all; else VERMELHO>AMARELO>NEUTRO among only UN-ATTENDED (assistido is False) pathways

RULE-trilha-BE-04-016: automatic-bed pathway set = v3 [SedacaoV3, EficienciaV3, EstabilidadeV3, SepseV3, ProfilaxiaV3] + v2 [Ventilacao, Antimicrobiano, Nutricao, Equilibrio, GlozaZero]; several legacy v2 models commented out (DISCREPANCY)
RULE-trilha-BE-04-017: homecare bed evaluates exactly [PioraClinica, Sepse]; other cards are static NEUTRO display stubs
RULE-trilha-BE-04-039: every prontuario spawns exactly 4 manual pathways [Estabilidade, Sedacao, Sepse, Ventilacao]
RULE-alerta-BE-04-021: bed 'assistido' = every non-NEUTRO pathway attended; all-NEUTRO bed counts as NOT attended
RULE-movimentacao-BE-04-036: new movimentacao deactivates prior (atual=False) and clones prontuario + noradrenalina/PCR/ventilacao/sedativos/SOFA, applying any new values (carry-forward)
RULE-movimentacao-BE-04-035: discharge (baixa) allowed only if movimentacao.atual, then frees bed (ocupado=False)
RULE-validation-BE-04-042: manual admission blocked on tipo=='automatica' beds and on already-ocupado beds
RULE-acesso-BE-04-012: GrupoAcesso must attach to exactly ONE of empresa/estabelecimento/setor (three_xor); Group name = 'nome-pk', unique on create
RULE-movimentacao-BE-04-024/025: length-of-stay = (today - data_entrada.date()).days; prontuario timestamps displayed with hardcoded -3h offset (DISCREPANCY: naive UTC-3, not tz-aware)
RULE-acesso-BE-04-049: live RBAC = scope-based (empresa/estabelecimento/setor) permission dispatch with per-HTTP-method perms + exceto_metodo bypass; anonymous->403
extraction.concerns: Key cross-partition dependencies a verifier must chase: the actual SOFA point computation, the VERMELHO/AMARELO/NEUTRO/LARANJA color assignment per pathway, and verificar_uso_ventilacao_mecanica/noradrenalina/existencia_sedativos all live OUTSIDE this partition (trilha_manual, trilha_automatica, trilha_homecare); this partition only assembles inputs and aggregates results. Age is computed by core/utils.calcular_idade using integer //365 (ignores leap years) - out of partition (core/utils.py) so recorded only as a note, but likely a DISCREPANCY worth a dedicated rule in whichever partition owns core/utils.py. Confirmed DISCREPANCIES within BE-04: (1) RULE-016 v2/v3 pathway duplication with disabled models; (2) RULE-002 Observacao vs Assistido enum label drift (SEPSE vs Sepse, missing accent on Piora Clinica); (3) RULE-025 hardcoded -3h timezone offset; (4) RULE-034 usuario_grupo_acesso.py:38 super().save(*args, *kwargs) - the second splat is *kwargs (positional) not **kwargs, a latent bug. AMBIGUOUS: RULE-008 PermissaoChoices (r/rw, admin/medico/enfermeiro) defined but its Permissao model is fully commented out - dormant; real RBAC is via Django group permissions (RULE-049). Note the 12-slug pathway enum (RULE-001) is duplicated across AssistidoChoices and ObservacaoChoices and maps onto the automatic/homecare model sets. rule_bearing serializes as YAML booleans (yes->True/no->False), which is standard.

highlights: Login cascade: local Django auth first, then external americashealth.co SSO fallback that auto-provisions a local Usuario with NO Trilhas-specific entitlement check (login.py:44-69) - DISCREPANCY

GrupoAcesso permission update is replace-all filtered to a system catalog (PermissionsChoices); empty dict does NOT clear permissions, but empty usuarios list DOES clear membership - asymmetric truthy-check bugs echoed in UsuarioViewSet.manage_data (grupos_acessos empty list silently dropped)
Hierarchical scope resolution pattern (setor > estabelecimento > empresa) reused across GrupoAcesso and PermissaoDeUsuario views/querysets

Occupancy % formula: round(ocupados/total*100, 2) if total else 0 - duplicated at Setor and Estabelecimento level, both with a numerator/denominator ativo-scoping mismatch that can push occupancy over 100% (get_total_leitos requires ativo=True, get_total_leitos_ocupados does not)
Chat retention window: exclude messages older than 96h when filtering by leito, else 48h (chat.py)
Sector 'atualizado_em' floors the minute to the nearest 5-minute bucket but leaves seconds/microseconds untouched (setor.py:112-116)

Setor indicadores action: complex multi-pathway VERMELHO/AMARELO alert+assisted aggregation; assumes automatica trilha model PK == nr_atendimento, homecare picks latest row per atendimento via DISTINCT ON pattern; manual sectors explicitly unsupported (raises ValidationError)

Homecare bed 'trilhas' payload is currently a static 3-item template (calls Model.get_payload() at class level) - all real per-patient piora_clinica/sepse querying is commented out/dead code - DISCREPANCY (leito.py _get_trilhas_homecare)

assistido (attend) workflow: v3 trilha models updated via bulk .update(), legacy via instance.save(); AssistidoPor audit snapshot (all fields stringified) created ONLY when marking assistido=True, never when un-marking
Offline endpoints hardcode request.empresa = Empresa.objects.get(whitelabel='homecare') regardless of the authenticated user's real company (dados_offline.py, all 4 views) - DISCREPANCY

Continuous prescription 'dia_real' rolls to the next day for horario < 07:00 (shift-boundary rule), and prescription window is today - QTD_DIAS(=2) i.e. inclusive last 3 days, ordered by day then a 5-tier DS_TIPO_ITEM_PRESCR priority

'ocupacoes__pk' URL kwarg is overloaded to mean EITHER a Movimentacao pk (manual beds) or a Leito pk (automatica/homecare) - same dual-mode resolution pattern independently reimplemented in observacao.py, assistido.py, and integracao_amhdocs.py

Sepse screening: 11 boolean criteria (fever>38, tachypnea FR>20, hypotension PAS<90/PAD<60, oliguria diurese_sonda<=100mL<2h, hypothermia<36, tachycardia FC>110, device dwell>7d) grouped maiores[1-7]/menores[8-11]; alert VERMELHO if maiores>2 or menores==4, AMARELO if maiores==2 or menores==3 (sepse.py 105-383)

PioraClinica MEWS-like deterioration score: 9 graded criteria (FR/temp/PAS/FC/consciencia/pain-numeric/pain-behavioral/SatO2-regular/SatO2-DPOC) each returning signed grades 0..3+/-; alert by last-matching-criterion override plus soma-band 0-7/8-14/15-21 (piora_clinica.py 83-262)
DISCREPANCY: piora criterio_6 '7<=dor>10' and criterio_7 '10<=sinais>12' are buggy compound comparisons making the highest pain band UNREACHABLE (severe pain 7-10 / 10-12 scores 0)
DISCREPANCY: sepse criterio_7 returns anterior>atual on a higher=worse consciousness hierarchy, firing on IMPROVEMENT not deterioration (direction inverted)
DISCREPANCY: tempo_criacao() uses timedelta.seconds (0-86399) not total_seconds(), so all sepsis '<=24h' recency windows are effectively always-true and '<2h'/'<=12h' guards wrap daily
DISCREPANCY: sepse criterio_11 hard-coded False -> menores maxes at 3 -> alert condition menores==4 unreachable; VERMELHO only via maiores>2

DISCREPANCY: piora criterio_8 scores SatO2>96 as '2+' (high saturation raises deterioration alert - clinically inverted); criterio_8 and criterio_9 both read same saturacao_o2 field, double-weighting SpO2

Fluid balance (balanco.py): balanco_acumulado=sum(entradas)-sum(saidas) across all days for bed+admission; balanco_diurno = day-shift window hardcoded 07:00-19:00; balanco_noturno = balanco_24h - balanco_diurno

AMBIGUOUS: Formulario 24h rollups (evacuacoes/diurese/ganhos/temp/hgt/balanco) delegate to trilha_homecare.utils (out of partition); commented-out formula shows balanco_24h = gains - (diuresis + vomit) over [ref-1d, ref]
Validation ranges: Glasgow [3,15], escala_dor [0,10], sinais_dor [3,12] (BPS), fluxo_o2 [1,15] L/min, PEEP [5,18], pressao_inspiratoria [5,40]
Clinical scale enums: RASS -5..+4, FOIS 7 levels, LPP pressure-injury staging I-IV, peri-wound edema 4cm thresholds, nutrition prophylaxis vm_mais_72h (VM>72h)
DISCREPANCY: acao_homecare.validar_leito() has dead-code inner guard so 'unoccupied bed' rule never fires, and validar_leito is not called from save()
extraction.concerns: Two scoring engines here (Sepse, PioraClinica) are the crown jewels of BE-06 and contain several implementation bugs that MUST be preserved verbatim in the rebuild and flagged for clinical review, not silently 'corrected': (1) unreachable severe-pain bands from malformed compound comparisons, (2) inverted consciousness-change direction in sepse criterio_7, (3) tempo_criacao seconds-vs-total_seconds bug that neutralizes all sepsis time-window guards, (4) SatO2>96 raising a deterioration alert. Several rules depend on code OUTSIDE this partition that a verifier/coordinator must cross-map: trilha_homecare/utils.py (evacuacoes_24h_evo, diureses_24h_evo, ganhos_24h_evo, temperatura_24h_evo, hgt_24h_evo, balanco_24h_evo - the ACTIVE 24h fluid-balance formulas), utils/handlers.py (diferenca_dias used by sepse criterio_10 dwell-time, format_horario), and utils/validators.py (PASValidator/PADValidator bounds on SinaisVitais.pas/pad - not visible in partition). Facade payloads (trilha_homecare/facade/sepse.py, facade/piora_clinica.py) hold the recommendation/criterion-detail text surfaced by get_detalhe(). Also note dados_paciente_evolucao.py stores calculo_imc/peso_ideal but the IMC/ideal-weight formulas are computed elsewhere (likely serializer, out of partition). RASS enum is defined but not wired to any model field within this partition.

highlights: Fluid balance (balanço hídrico): Entrada.create adds quantidade to balanco.balanco_24h, Saida.create subtracts it — both are incremental accumulators never corrected on update()

Saida presence-level->volume mapping (100/200/300 for presente+/++/+++) has an operator-precedence bug: `presenca and tipo=="evacuacao" or tipo=="vomito_retorno_sonda"` applies to vomito_retorno_sonda regardless of presenca
Default volumes: dieta_enteral entrada defaults to 200; saida presenca_espontanea=='presente' defaults to 200

SinaisVitais.create unconditionally auto-creates a PioraClinica record AND a Sepse (sepsis-screening) record linked to the encounter's most-recent Formulario — the core sepsis-pathway trigger in this partition

Three non-equivalent 'suspenso' (prescription suspended) formulas coexist: two dead/shadowed get_suspenso defs plus a live per-dose day/time check in horario_prescricao.py, vs a simple dt_suspensao<=now() check at the PrescricaoContinua header level in prescricao.py

07:00 is the recurring homecare shift/day boundary: used both to pick which BalancoHidrico day an exported dose quantity is booked against, and to reorder pre-7am doses under the next calendar day for display
AcaoHomecareSerializer.get_balanco_hidrico returns `obj.balanco_hidrico.get_pk` (missing parentheses) — never actually calls the method, so it likely serializes a bound-method repr instead of the pk
FormularioBaseSerializer.assinar() stamps dt_assinatura = formulario.dt_registro instead of the signature's own timestamp

FormularioBaseSerializer.liberar() only calls the Tasy release task if tipo is in a hardcoded whitelist (medico/enfermagem/fisioterapeuta/terapeuta/nutricionista/psicologo/musicoterapeuta/fonoaudiologo/intercorrencia) — tecnico_enfermagem is explicitly commented out and excluded
FormularioEnfermagemSerializer declares a required field 'dispositivos_invasivos_novo' that is absent from every Meta.fields tuple, violating DRF's declared-field contract
FormularioNutricionistaSerializer uniquely requires avaliacao_global/terapia_nutricional/avaliacao_abdominal (required=True) unlike every sibling professional-type form
can_delete logic for Entrada guards missing request.empresa with a clear ValidationError, but the byte-identical logic in Saida/SinaisVitais does not, risking an unhandled AttributeError
Clinical-day cutoff at 07:00 (not midnight) for default balanco-hidrico 'dia'; hour>=7 -> today else yesterday (balanco_hidrico.py:32-37)

BUG: BalancoHidricoViewSet.list() discards the caller-supplied 'dia' string and substitutes yesterday's date for record auto-creation whenever the request hour is before 07:00 (balanco_hidrico.py:48-64) - DISCREPANCY
Form visibility rule: a Formulario is only visible if authored by the requester OR status=='liberado' (formulario_base.py:61-66)
validar_inativacao() forbids inactivating a 'liberado' form but is never called from destroy() - dead validation (formulario_base.py:142-169) - DISCREPANCY
Entrada destroy subtracts, Saida destroy adds, instance.quantidade to/from balanco.balanco_24h on soft-delete (entradas.py:48-67, saidas.py:35-54)

Entrada/Saida/SinaisVitais list endpoints use plain `.objects` (not objects_without_deleted), so soft-deleted rows remain visible - inconsistent with BalancoHidrico/HorarioPrescricao viewsets - DISCREPANCY x3
exceto_metodo tuples misspell PATCH as 'PATH' in 4 viewsets (entradas/saidas/sinais_vitais/horario_prescricao), potentially leaving PATCH ungated or mis-gated by permission_trilhas - AMBIGUOUS
PDF export 'b64' query flag is truthy-checked (any non-empty string, even 'false', triggers base64 JSON) vs 'assinatura' flag explicitly checked against ['true','True'] - DISCREPANCY

Continuous-prescription priority ordering: DIETA=1, MEDICAMENTO_SOLUÇÃO=2, SN_ACM=3, RECOMENDACAO_ENFERMAGEM=4, RECOMENDACAO=5, duplicated in prescricao.py (includes soft-deleted, secondary sort criado_em) and pdf_prescricao.py (excludes soft-deleted, no secondary sort) - DISCREPANCY
multi_checagem bulk action always sets administrado=True for each listed horario, not wrapped in transaction.atomic (prescricao.py:113-126)
FormularioMedicoViewSet bundles SinaisVitais creation tied to BalancoHidrico lookup via suspicious `.get_pk` call (not `.pk`) on a BalancoHidrico instance - AMBIGUOUS (models.py out of scope)
pdf_prescricao.py has no validation for missing 'dia' or empty prescricoes queryset, unlike balanco_hidrico's guarded equivalents - DISCREPANCY

extraction.concerns: Two facades in scope are pure aliases into a DIFFERENT partition: trilha_homecare/facade/sepse.py -> core.facade.sepse.payload_trilha_sepse and trilha_homecare/facade/piora_clinica.py -> core.facade.piora_clinica.payload_trilha_piora_clinica. The actual sepsis and clinical-worsening pathway rules live under core/ and MUST be extracted by whoever owns the core partition; I recorded them only as cross-references. Also, the 24h aggregation helpers in utils.py all share TWO reproducible defects recorded VERBATIM (not corrected): (a) they filter on criado_em__day (day-of-month only, ignores month/year) so they break across month boundaries, and (b) in the else (hour>=7) branch the second queryset predicate 'criado_em == horario_ref AND hour < 7' is unsatisfiable, silently dropping the post-midnight portion of the 07:00-07:00 shift. get_visao_geral additionally has an inverted [22:00,00:00] bucket that always sums to 0. The full 24h-indicator PDF context is assembled by serializers in trilha_homecare/api/ (out of my scope) - the RULE-...-011 gate/value mismatch on pdf_medico.html should be cross-checked against that api/ partition. Meaning of the Tasy stored-proc constant 501 (liberar_evolucao) is not derivable from this repo.
highlights: 07:00-07:00 nursing day is the foundational shift boundary: pre-07:00 entries roll into the previous day's balanco (utils.obter_balanco) and drive all 24h aggregations
.24h fluid balance = sum(Entrada.quantidade) - sum(Saida.quantidade) over the 7-to-7 window (utils.balanco_24h_evo); missing sums default to 0
Diureses summed only for tipo in {diurese_espontanea, diurese_sonda}; evacuacoes only for tipo=evacuacao; temperatura_max_24h and hgt_max_24h return the MAX reading
DISCREPANCY (all 24h helpers): criado_em__day ignores month; else-branch qs2 'criado_em==horario_ref AND hour<7' is unsatisfiable -> drops 00:00-07:00 of the shift
DISCREPANCY get_visao_geral: 2h buckets from 08:00; the [22:00,00:00] bucket is an inverted range that always aggregates to 0; inclusive edges double-count boundary times
PrescricaoContinua daily generation eligibility: IE_EXIBE=S, DT_FIM null/>today, DT_SUSPENSAO null/>today, DT_LIBERACAO set, DT_INICIO<=today, and DT_PROX_GERACAO=today only if IE_GERACAO_DIFERENTE=S
Daily BalancoHidrico auto-created for beds where tipo=homecare AND ocupado=True AND nr_atendimento not null (idempotent per attendance+day)
Medication administration tri-state icon (pdf_prescription v1/v2): administrado==True -> check; ==False AND motivo -> X; else empty circle
Not-administered reason enum: {recusa_paciente, medicacao_suspensa, nao_tem_farmacia}; KeyError if code drifts (no default)
Homecare diagnosis choice enum (16 chronic/critical conditions) with load-bearing typos: 'corononariana', 'diabettes_mellitus_tipo2', non-ASCII 'doença_de_alzheimer' key
Digital signature only applied when acting user has BOTH cpf AND pin; otherwise skipped with a warning (no exception)
AMBIGUOUS billing: liberar_evolucao calls Tasy proc amh_gerar_lancamento_auto with fixed code 501 / origin TasyApp; routes to prod Oracle only when ENVIRONMENT=prod; ConnectionError swallowed
SOFA 6-criteria score + total in models/sofa.py; PAM=((2*PAD)+PAS)/3
SOFA bilirubin/renal have DISCREPANCY None-gaps from strict < at upper bounds
SOFA cardiovascular uses noradrenaline ml volume (>10=4) not mcg/kg/min (DISCREPANCY)
Systemic FiO2 unit inconsistency: validator 21-100% vs fraction math in ratios/thresholds
Sepsis = 20 criteria major(1-9)/minor(10-20); VERMELHO needs maiores>=3 AND menores>=4
Sepsis C6 PAD<90 vs text PAD<60; C7 oliguria fixed 1200mL/24h (DISCREPANCY)
Ventilation FiO2xPEEP allow-list tables (moderate 151-300 vs severe <150); C2 guard drops peep>0
Ventilation C4 compares dispositivo against modalidade values PCV/VCV -> unreachable (DISCREPANCY)
Ventilation alert: any C1/C8/C9 forces VERMELHO regardless of count
Stability C6 needs noradrenaline EXACTLY ==50 ml; C3 uses >21 vs text >=21
Bed alert aggregation VERMELHO>AMARELO>NEUTRO + Mensageiro notify on new-red; get_assistido logic
24 field range validators; SatO2 validator disabled; sedative 0-30 ml, overdose >15
buscar_ultimos_dados lookback chain feeds 12h/24h criteria; potential infinite loop
Legacy variants: sepse 27 vs 20 criteria, noradrenaline 25->21, VM+COVID 14->10 days
Homecare occupancy access scoped to user-assigned patients (UsuarioSetorPaciente)
extraction.concerns: Validator bodies (exact numeric ranges) live in utils/validators.py, which is OUTSIDE partition BE-10 (likely another partition's scope). I captured the 24 range rules from the in-scope model field declarations + test_limites_parametros assertions and cross-referenced the exact bounds from utils/validators.py for accuracy - a verifier should confirm those bounds against whichever partition owns utils/. Similarly the trilha payload dictionaries (payload_sepse_manual etc.) and Mensageiro/Observacao/Movimentacao live in core/ (out of scope) - facade files only re-export them. FiO2 unit inconsistency (percentage validator vs fraction math) is systemic and affects SOFA respiratory + several ventilation/sepse criteria; recommend a coordinator-level decision on canonical FiO2 units before rebuild. Several DISCREPANCY rules are recorded VERBATIM (bilirubin/renal SOFA gaps, ==50 noradrenaline, PAD<90, device/modality confusion, malformed C2 guard) and must NOT be silently 'corrected' during reimplementation.

highlights: novo_etl_schema (v2 Tasy sync) overwrites instead of OR-accumulates the criterio-changed flag, so assistido may fail to reset to False even when an earlier criterio changed (utils/etl.py) — DISCREPANCY vs etl_schema v1.
PeepValidator caps PEEP at 40 but popular_banco.py's synthetic-data range table uses 41 — a cross-file numeric mismatch.
SatO2Validator has no zero-value exemption while the structurally identical FiO2Validator (same 21-100 bounds) exempts 0 — internal inconsistency.
Cryptocubo PIN fallback: base64.b64encode(usuario.pin.encode()).decode() or env.get('CRYPTOCUBO_PIN') crashes on pin=None and sends an unencoded fallback PIN when pin='' — DISCREPANCY.
SetUpModel.delete() overrides ParanoiaMixin.delete(), silently disabling the latter's cascade-soft-delete and admin-path hard-delete branches for any model built on SetUpModel.
ParanoiaMixin.delete(): deletes made via the Django admin path default to a REAL hard delete unless soft_delete=True is explicitly passed — inverse of expected safety convention.
conteudo_observacao_criterios has a disabled/commented-out sepse-specific alert message ('Risco para SEPSE: realizar abertura do Protocolo Institucional') — feature appears retired but left in code.
get_microindicadores maps a generic vasoactive-drug flag (DVA=='S') to an output key literally named 'noradrenalina', overstating drug specificity.

uwsgi-demo.ini / uwsgi-homol-old.ini run BOTH a standalone Celery beat daemon AND an embedded -B beat flag on the atualizar_trilhas worker — double beat scheduling; uwsgi-homol.ini/uwsgi-prod.ini fixed this.
start.sh's production branch execs uwsgi --ini uwsgi/uwsgi.ini, a file that does not exist in the repo (only uwsgi-prod.ini does).
utils/exceptions.py flatten_errors uses collections.MutableMapping, removed from collections in Python 3.10+ (project pins Python 3.9 per Dockerfile) — latent break on upgrade.

Certain Celery queues (atualizar_trilhas, executar_trilhas, estabelecimento_setor_leito, prescricoes, prescricao_continua, etl_dados_brutos, callprocedure) are forced to concurrency=1 across all environments to serialize pathway-state mutations.
All actual Django migration files are gitignored (only __init__.py markers tracked) — no data migrations/seed data present in this repo snapshot for any app.
25 physiological/vital-sign range validators extracted verbatim from utils/validators.py (FiO2 21-100, Glasgow 3-15, PAS 50-250, etc.), several with an inconsistent 'value==0 is exempt' pattern.
RASS sedation-agitation scale (+4..-5 mapped to labels) in dataFormMovimentacao (RULE-020)
Glasgow Coma Scale 3-15 implemented twice: movimentacao 'interval' vs formularioMedico 'number' (RULE-019/037)
FOIS 7-level Functional Oral Intake Scale in fonoaudiologo (RULE-063)
NPUAP pressure-injury (LPP) staging I-IV + suspected-deep-tissue + unstageable, with a 4cm peri-wound-edema >=/< boundary (RULE-039)
Movimentacao is the SOFA/sepsis data-collection surface: lab ranges + vasopressor dosing + infection-window booleans (10-day line, 7-day femoral CVC, ATB<24h) (RULE-024/026/028)
Fluid-balance intake/output decision trees with required ml volumes and drug/antibiotic/electrolyte controlled vocabularies (RULE-007..013)
Pain assessment branches to NRS 0-10 (verbal complaint) vs BPS-like 3-12 (observed signs) (RULE-015, AMBIGUOUS scale identity)
Divergent ventilator validation ranges across forms: PEEP 0-40 (movimentacao/medico) vs 5-18 (fisio); PINS 0-30 vs 5-40 (RULE-023/036/053, DISCREPANCY)
DISCREPANCY: movimentacao ventilation option value vm_invasiva carries label 'Cateter Nasal de 02' (value/label semantic mismatch) (RULE-030)
DISCREPANCY: dataFormFarmaceutico.ts exports a const named dataFormFisioterapeuta; also a malformed antibiotic-list field using key 'Data' instead of 'label' (RULE-056/058)
DISCREPANCY: formularioMedico chronic-diagnosis options end in a stray comma -> sparse array with undefined option; plus value typos (diabettes, doença) (RULE-031)
Capillary refill (TEC) encoded three inconsistent ways (number 3-20, boolean >5s, checkbox >5s) and LPP value drift 'crepitacao_maior_4cm' in tec-enfermagem (RULE-022/076, DISCREPANCY)
extraction.concerns: Heavy duplication with subtle value drift across forms will need de-dup + reconciliation by the coordinator: the nutrition-therapy block, the LPP/pressure-injury staging list, the assistance-risk multicheck, and neuro/emotional/orientation enums are copy-pasted across enfermagem/tec-enfermagem/nutricionista/fisio/farmaceutico/fono/psico with occasional divergences (e.g. LPP edema value crepitacao_maior_4cm vs crepitacao_edema_com_sulco_maior_4cm; PEEP/PINS range differences; TEC encodings). Two rule-bearing dependencies live OUTSIDE partition FE-01 and must be linked cross-partition: emailPattern regex (src/utils/constants.ts:7-9, reproduced in RULE-002) and the anatomical-site vocabulary localLesoes (src/utils/localLesoes.ts, referenced by all LPP/lesion lists). Additionally, three form groups delegate their fields to React components not in scope (FieldsetAvGlobalNutricionista, FieldsetMtTerapeuticaNutricionista, FieldSetDadosPacienteFisioterapeuta) and Fieldset* under components/ — those hold nutritionist/physio rules that another partition must cover. These forms are pure data-collection UI: any actual SOFA/sepsis/NEWS scoring FORMULA is NOT in this partition (backend); FE-01 captures only the input fields, ranges, enums and conditional reveals that feed it. Numeric drug fields (noradrenalina, sedativos, dobutamina) record quantities with NO units in code — reimplementation risk.

highlights: dateTurn.ts: shift/turno calendar-day assignment with overnight-shift (end<=start ->+1 day) handling and EXCLUSIVE isBetween boundaries (high confidence)
justOclock.ts: round-to-whole-hour with strict >30 threshold - DISCREPANCY: :30 rounds DOWN, and 23:31-23:59 -> '24:00' -> silently wraps to '00:00' dropping the date

convertBalancoData.ts: fluid-balance (balanco hidrico) row type resolution - free-text 'nome' shown only when tipo == sentinel 'outra_entrada'/'outra_saida', else humanized type; signature date DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm
statusTrilha.ts: care-pathway severity color enum NEUTRO/VERMELHO/AMARELO/LARANJA/ASSISTIDO (green/red/yellow/orange/blue triage scale)
handleIconByStatus.ts: record lifecycle status enum salvo/liberado/inativo -> icon+color (empty/default -> gray)

cargos.ts: 15 role select-options vs broader cargosObject label map - AMBIGUOUS due to synonym drift (tec_enfermagem/tecnico_enfermagem, enfermeiro/enfermagem) and object-only codes (musicoterapeuta, intercorrencia, medico, terapeuta)
categoriaArquivo.ts: 54 medical-record document category codes incl. TISS/SADT guides, authorization guides, homecare (EHC*/Vida Conecta) evolution notes, Declaracao de Obito
motivosNaoAdministrado.ts: medication non-administration reasons (recusa_paciente, medicacao_suspensa, nao_tem_farmacia, outros)
localLesoes.ts: 44 anatomical lesion/catheter-insertion sites (pressure-injury + central-line); verbatim typos 'toronozelo' (tornozelo/ankle), 'inframaria' (inframamaria)
formatter.ts: Brazilian masks CPF(11)/CNPJ(14)/CEP(8)/phone(length 8-11 branching)/BRL currency/byte-sizes(base 1024)
constants.ts: email validation regex (anchored, 63-char domain labels, TLD optional) + env detection (baseURL contains 'homol' -> staging else prod)

dateTreatmentMoment.ts + dateTreatmentString.ts: date-field convention - keys containing 'data_' or 'dt_' treated as dates; string variant returns null on empty object, moment variant drops falsy values
extraction.concerns: Cross-partition duplication to reconcile: the email regex in constants.ts almost certainly overlaps FE-01 emailFormRules.ts/defaultFormRules.ts, and convertBalancoData.ts pairs with dataForms/dataFormBalancoHidrico.ts (FE-01). Two verbatim likely-bugs recorded, not corrected: (1) justOclock.ts 23:31-23:59 wraps to '00:00' losing the day and :30 rounds down; (2) isImage.ts extension check is case-SENSITIVE so uppercase .PNG/.JPG are rejected. YAML gotcha for the coordinator: rule_bearing values are the bare words yes/no, which YAML 1.1 parsers coerce to booleans True/False - handle accordingly when aggregating. Several enums are frontend copies of backend choice lists (cargos, conselho, sexo, estados, categoriaArquivo) and should be diffed against the backend partitions for authoritative source. statusTrilha color-to-status mapping is captured but the logic that COMPUTES which trilha gets which severity color lives outside this partition.

highlights: RULE-trilha-FE-03-001: interactive protocol only for pathways named exactly 'Sepse' or 'Profilaxia' AND (existing instance OR history OR can_criar_novo_protocolo)
RULE-trilha-FE-03-002: interactive pathway rendered only when ocupacao.leito.tipo === 'automatica' (automatic beds only)
RULE-trilha-FE-03-007: assist eligibility = alerta!=NEUTRO && criterios && can_assist_ocupacao; only the assisting user may un-assist (owner-only uncheck)
RULE-trilha-FE-03-006: pathway color precedence key = assistido?'ASSISTIDO':(alerta||'NEUTRO') -> statusTrilha palette {NEUTRO,VERMELHO,AMARELO,LARANJA,ASSISTIDO}
RULE-sepse-FE-03-001: sepsis lifecycle display precedence concluida > finalizado; finalizado shows 'Motivo Recusa: <motivo_descartado>'
RULE-sepse-FE-03-002: sepsis item first-hour delay alert driven by item.atraso_primeira_hora (red clock, #e84748)
RULE-sepse-FE-03-003: sepsis step shown only if item.exibir; expandable only if descricao_item or checado_por (conditional pathway branching)
RULE-balanco-FE-03-001: BP composed as systolic/diastolic with '--' when pas/pad not >0; BP row hidden if neither >0
RULE-balanco-FE-03-004 DISCREPANCY: overview cell visibility differs desktop value!==0 vs mobile quantidades[i]>0 (negatives shown in grid, hidden in mobile)
RULE-balanco-FE-03-006 DISCREPANCY: ItemSaida sign button calls onSign('entrada', id) — signs output record under intake route (bug)
RULE-trilha-FE-03-004 AMBIGUOUS: accept sends aceito=boolean true, refuse sends aceito=string 'false'; refuse requires motivo_descartado (required); PATCH if instance exists else POST
RULE-trilha-FE-03-009: per-criterion drug dosing surfaced as image (criterio.imagem) in 'Dosagens' modal — numeric doses not code-extractable
extraction.concerns: Two DISCREPANCIES need downstream attention: (1) ItemSaida.tsx line 93 signs saida records via onSign('entrada', id) — a copy-paste route bug that likely mis-routes/errs the signature PATCH; (2) fluid-balance overview applies inconsistent visibility thresholds (GridView value!==0 vs MobileView >0), diverging on negative volumes. One AMBIGUOUS: TrilhaInterativa sends `aceito` as boolean true on accept but string 'false' on refuse — verifier must confirm backend coerces both. Also note a minor routing bug: goToProtocolos (TrilhaInterativa.tsx line 170) appends a stray literal '}' after ${trilha.id} in the URL template. Several rules depend on out-of-partition modules not read in full: src/utils/statusTrilha.ts (alert color enum keys NEUTRO/VERMELHO/AMARELO/LARANJA/ASSISTIDO — I read it for context), src/utils/defaultFormRules (refuse justification required validator), src/utils/convertBalancoData (server-to-view transform that may hold real fluid-balance totals/calculations — recommend a backend/utils partition capture it), and the backend logic that sets item.exibir, atraso_primeira_hora, has_item_em_atraso, and trilha.alerta severity (no numeric thresholds exist in this frontend partition). Drug dosing (RULE-trilha-FE-03-009) is delivered as an image asset, so numeric doses are not extractable from code.

Several rules depend on util files OUTSIDE this partition (src/utils/), which a verifier/other partition must reconcile: motivosNaoAdministrado.ts (not-administered reason enum), dateTurn.ts (07:00-07:00 shift-day algorithm), clearIds.ts (id-stripping on create), verifyNullKeys.ts, isEmpty.ts (annul/nullify logic), handleIconByStatus.ts (evolution status enum salvo/liberado/inativo), defaultFormRules.ts (required rule). The SOFA score and balanco hidrico (fluid balance) SUMMATION are computed in the backend / other FE partitions; this partition only displays SOFA (>=0) and captures the ml qtd_exportada input that feeds fluid balance. Two probable defects recorded verbatim (not corrected): RULE-prontuario-FE-04-038 (SubFormString disable uses inverted !isAnnulled AND dereferences nullifiers[grupoKey] without a null guard -> can throw TypeError; opposite direction from all other subforms) = DISCREPANCY; RULE-prontuario-FE-04-039 (SubFormCheckbox keys conditional sub-fields off e.target.value, which is undefined for an antd Checkbox onChange -> conditions likely never render) = AMBIGUOUS. Also note colors for the same logical horario state differ between the tag/icon set and the popover set.
highlights: IMC/BMI = peso / altura^2, live-computed on peso/altura change, stored via toFixed(2); ||0 guard (FieldsetAvGlobalNutricionista.tsx 43-90)
Nursing shift-day window 07:00-07:00 via dateTurn(now,7:00,7:00); pre-07:00 belongs to previous day (Prescricoes.tsx 49)
Horario status priority ladder: suspenso > administrado > motivo_nao_administrado > asbutton > pending (HorarioCheck.tsx 126-138)
Suspended horario blocks all check/administration actions; check btn fires only if !checado_por && !suspenso (HorarioCheck.tsx 150-236)
ml-unit medications capture qtd_exportada explicitly for balanco hidrico; defaults to prescribed quantidade (CheckModalContent.tsx 39-132)
Not-administered reason enum {recusa_paciente, medicacao_suspensa, nao_tem_farmacia, outros}; 'outros' requires free text
Revert check requires justificativa_cancelamento, forces administrado=false; only the checking user may revert (HorarioCheck 98-115, ModalRevertCheck)
Horario persistence routing: no horarioId->POST, horarioId+body->PATCH, horarioId only->DELETE (Prescricao.tsx 41-52)
SOFA score badge displayed only when dados_prontuario.escore_sofa >= 0 (FormDadosProntuario.tsx 85-94)
Annullable groups nulled to {}/[] on submit; checavel subgroup nulled when toggled off (nullifyFields, SubGroupHandle)
Evolution state machine salvo/liberado/inativo; author-only edit/inactivate/re-sign; Liberar sets status=liberado + assinar=true (HistoricoEvolucao 92-296)
Dynamic field validators: number/interval inclusive min-max, multicheck array min-max, list max item cap, masked regex, required-if

RULE-ventilacao-FE-05-001: ARDSNet-style predicted body weight (50/45.5 + 0.91*(height_cm-152.4)) + 4/5/6 mL/kg protective tidal-volume calc in FieldSetDadosPacienteFisioterapeuta.tsx — matches standard formula, status OK
RULE-turno-FE-05-001: CustomDatePicker disables navigating past the 7:00/7:00 shift-turnover cutoff (dateTurn util) for record dates
RULE-cadastro-FE-05-002: FormUsuario auto-fills new user's password with their unformatted CPF digits (security-relevant, AMBIGUOUS)
RULE-cadastro-FE-05-003: FormUsuario hardcodes every user's signature PIN to literal "Homecare@Vidaconecta" (AMBIGUOUS/security)
RULE-prontuario-FE-05-001: FormProntuario.tsx Form.Item fields have no bound input controls at all — form captures no data as implemented (DISCREPANCY)

RULE-filtro-FE-05-003 vs -004: FilterLeitos sends its 'no preference' sentinel literally ('unknown') while FilterOcupacoes explicitly maps its sentinel ('todos') to undefined — inconsistent handling flagged AMBIGUOUS
RULE-cadastro-FE-05-006: Leito/Estabelecimento nome+codigo fields locked whenever empresa.tipo !== 'manual', overriding normal edit mode
RULE-arquivo-FE-05-001: Leito file list default ordering 'data_arquivo' has no '-' prefix, ambiguous asc vs intended desc (AMBIGUOUS)
RULE-video-FE-05-003: video call Controls.tsx registers routeChangeStart auto-leave listener on every render with no cleanup (leak)
RULE-notificacao-FE-05-001/002/003: websocket notifications filter out self-authored messages, debounce popups to 1/2s, and branch navigation by tipo_mensagem (setor vs leito/trilha)
36 rules total: 30 OK, 5 AMBIGUOUS, 1 DISCREPANCY; 54 of 173 files were pure .less styling and most index.tsx were barrel re-exports (rule_bearing: no)
Assistido-overrides-alerta status color precedence (RULE-alerta-FE-06-001): assistido flag always beats raw alerta level for status color, duplicated in InfoPacienteHeader and CollapseCard
Bed-occupancy color thresholds (DashboardCard): >70% red, >50% amber, else green (strict > boundaries)
Sector-level aggregate alert decision tree: ASSISTIDO (100% assisted) > VERMELHO (tie-favored) > AMARELO > NEUTRO > '' with total_alertas absent defaulting to NEUTRO
alertPercent/assistPercent formulas: alert*100/(NEUTRO+AMARELO+VERMELHO) and assist*100/(AMARELO+VERMELHO), both 0-guarded on div-by-zero
Bed action-button eligibility gated jointly by leito.tipo (manual/homecare) and role permissions; empty homecare beds expose no action button at all
Trilha click routing decision tree: prescricao/balanco_hidrico route to dedicated pages, evolucao opens type-selector, default opens recommendations drawer
Evolucao save-vs-save-and-release workflow: 'Salvar' vs 'Salvar e Liberar' toggles payload status='liberado' and assinar flag (e-signature workflow)
Prontuario movimentacao submission: noradrenalina/parada_cardiorrespiratoria/ventilacao_mecanica annulled unless truthy+non-empty; dates reformatted YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm; CPF unformatted
DISCREPANCY: GestaoPacienteContent 'Atualizar Lista' button disabled check uses array reference equality (===) instead of value comparison, so it is practically always enabled
Chat checagem toggle authorization: disabled if already checked by someone else or inside a reply preview
Chat pagination hardcoded to page size 20 with load-more gated on nextOffset <= count

Multiple null/undefined-vs-truthy display rule variants across InformacaoesAssistenciais, ItemIndicadores24h, MicroIndicadores, and DashboardCard's tx_mortalidade — inconsistent zero-handling worth flagging to the rebuild team
Login redirect decision tree: 0 empresas -> error+logout; 1 empresa -> auto-select and redirect; >1 -> company-picker screen (AuthContext.tsx:128-160)
Session cookie lifetimes: trilhas.token maxAge=30 days; trilhas.permissions maxAge=86400s; Authorization header literally 'JWT ${token}' (AuthContext.tsx)
Effective permission = intersection of user's permissions with the system-wide allPermissions catalog; permissions outside the catalog are silently dropped (useEffectivePermissions.tsx)
Per-professional evolution-form gate: tab visible if can_preencher_formulario_<role>; submit enabled only if that AND can_manage_evolucao, across 10 roles (useEvolucaoMenu.tsx)
DISCREPANCY: DashboardItem.TotalAlerta defines a 4th severity 'LARANJA' absent from the 3-level Ocupacao.Alerta/Estatisticas.Alertas enums used everywhere else
DISCREPANCY: RASS typed as number in Ocupacao.InformacoesAssistenciais but as string in Prontuario.DadosProntuario
DISCREPANCY: encounter identifier is numero_atendimento:number (Prontuario) vs nr_atendimento:string (BalancoHidrico/Evolucao) - different name AND type
DISCREPANCY: hooks/networking/dashboard.ts builds '/empresas/${empresaId}}/estabelecimentos/...' with a stray literal '}' - malformed URL, recorded verbatim
DISCREPANCY: Arquivo.Categoria (34 values incl. EI) vs Leito.CategoriaArquivo (33 values, EI missing) - drifted duplicate enums
DISCREPANCY: useEvolucaoMenu's 'formulario_farmaceutica' key matches neither Utils.FormsEvolucao (omits pharmacist entirely) nor the masculine can_preencher_formulario_farmaceutico permission name
Sepsis pathway: aceito/motivo_descartado accept-discard workflow gated by can_recusar_protocolo_sepse; checklist items carry atraso_primeira_hora (golden-hour) flag with per-item CPF-verified signer
Search widgets share default limit=5 and 700ms debounce; CreateSearchInput additionally forces limit=5 on empty keyword unlike its two siblings (DISCREPANCY)

CRITICAL: validateRoute.ts initializes token as `{} as string` (truthy object) so `!token` never fires -> pages calling validateRoute(ctx) with default args (~18 pages incl. all clinical viewing pages: sepse, balanco hidrico, prescricao, camera feeds, dashboards) have NO effective SSR auth check
Permission-gated routes (validateRoute(ctx,false,perm)) work correctly: can_manage_empresa, can_manage_grupo_acesso, can_manage_usuario, can_access_camera, can_access_relatorio_evolucao
DISCREPANCY: Leitos (beds) management page gated by can_manage_grupo_acesso permission instead of a bed/empresa-specific permission

DISCREPANCY: Dashboard/Inconsistencias pages only reachable via UI buttons gated on empresa.tipo==='automatica', but the destination pages have no server-side re-check of tipo -> bypassable by direct URL

Company tipo enum ('manual'/'automatica'/'homecare') gates numerous UI features: manual-only add/edit for estabelecimentos/leitos/setores; homecare-only Feed & Relatorio de Evolucao shortcuts + Gestao de Pacientes tab; automatica-only Inconsistencias/Dashboard shortcuts
Balanco hidrico (fluid balance) uses a fixed clinical shift window of 07:00-07:00 (24h), not configurable per facility in this page
Sepse trilha interativa (interactive pathway) completion = concluida AND finalizado both true (AND logic) for the tracked id; then moves from current to historical
AMBIGUOUS: historical sepse trilhas fetched with filter aceito=false, semantics of 'not accepted' as 'historical' unclear
Professional profile page: client-side-only gate verifyUser = self OR can_manage_usuario, with SSR guard providing no protection (ties to the token bug)
DISCREPANCY: Feed page passes hardcoded mock trilhas array (4 pathways, alerta fixed to 'NEUTRO') into the recommendations drawer instead of real patient trilha state
AMBIGUOUS: Relatorio de Evolucao doubly gated by static cookie permission (SSR) and useEffectivePermissions() hook (client) which may diverge
Duplicate auto-refresh polling logic (interval = empresa.tempo_atualizacao*1000ms, gated by AutoReloadContext.update) implemented independently on both empresa and estabelecimento dashboards

Only 15 Less variables exist in the entire codebase (styles/variables.less), and that file is never @import-ed anywhere — it's a dead duplicate of the modifyVars object hardcoded a second time in next.config.js.

Color-literal sprawl is severe: ~221 raw color-literal occurrences in .less files (188 hex + 18 rgb/rgba/hsl + 15 named) plus 119 more inline hex literals in .tsx/.ts, versus only ~31 uses of the 15 declared @variables — roughly a 7:1 to 20:1 literal-to-token ratio.

5 of the 15 declared Less tokens (@skeleton-text, @degree, @grad-perc, @header-opacity, @border-width) are confirmed dead code — declared and duplicated into next.config.js but never consumed anywhere in the tree.

Clinical status colors bypass the declared semantic tokens entirely: medication-administration status (HorarioCheck.tsx) hardcodes #CCCCCC/#389e0c/#d4b105/#25979c and AntD preset names instead of using @success-color/@warning-color/@danger-color — a real consistency/safety risk for an ICU product.

Theme switching is actually 5 stacked, independently-authored mechanisms: (1) one build-time dark+compact+branded AntD Less compile, (2) a full stock antd/dist/antd.css re-imported client-side over it when 'light' cookie is set, (3) ~30 manual CSS patches fixing what (2) breaks, (4) 23 components each hand-rolling their own `.light` class with literal colors, and (5) a third-party `dynamic-antd-theme` runtime recompile + 2 CSS custom properties for per-tenant white-label branding (cor_primaria, configured via a color <input> in FormEmpresa).

Per-tenant brand color is applied twice per page load (hardcoded #fe6d01 default in _app.tsx, then the real tenant color once fetched in PageContainer.tsx) causing a flash-of-default-brand-color; `var(--warning-color)` is referenced once but never set anywhere (undefined at runtime).

No spacing, radius, shadow, motion-duration, or z-index scale exists anywhere — every dimension is a literal; equal radii are expressed inconsistently as both px and rem across files (8px/0.5rem, 10px/0.625rem, 12px/0.75rem).

Responsive layout is driven mainly by a JS width-comparison pattern (`width < collapseRule` where collapseRule=1260, collapseRuleMobile=800) repeated in ~40 components, plus 33 mostly one-off CSS @media breakpoints (324px-1590px) with no shared scale; a duplicate @collapse-rule Less variable exists unlinked in one page file.

Root html font-size is rescaled at 3 breakpoints (93.75% / 85.5% / 100%) in a non-monotonic order that, due to CSS cascade, makes the 85.5% rule apply only in a narrow 1261-1480px band — very likely an unintended interaction.

A genuinely distinctive neumorphic (dual-shadow) visual language is used for cards, but applied inconsistently between dark/light variants of the same component (some keep the dual-shadow in light mode, most drop to a flat shadow).

design.partition: D-02: Component Library & Information Architecture (trilhas-frontend @ f9656be2660ec2048ce6240b4ac418b7fe7d5a5b)
highlights: 117 component directories / 281 .tsx files under src/components; 27 routed pages under a single empresa→estabelecimento→setor→leito→ocupacao hierarchy — full route map and per-component catalog written to the inventory.

Theming: app is built on antd's DARK theme by default (getThemeVariables({dark:true}) in next.config.js); 'light mode' is a separate hand-written override stylesheet (LightTheme.less) toggled via cookie + full page reload, not a live theme switch.
Per-tenant white-labeling: each empresa has a stored brand hex (cor_primaria) applied at runtime via the dynamic-antd-theme package + CSS variables (--primary-color) inside PageContainer.

The real clinical severity color system is `statusTrilha` (Neutro/Vermelho/Amarelo/Laranja/Assistido, 6 shades each), an untyped (`as any`) TS object consumed via inline styles everywhere (e.g. CollapseCard bed cards) — not expressed in the LESS token file at all.

Responsive strategy is inconsistent: ~42 files use a single class-toggling `collapsed = width < 1260` pattern (useWindowSize + collapseRule), exactly one feature (BalancoHidricoVisaoGeral) forks into fully separate GridView/MobileView components, and ListOcupacoes computes antd Col spans via its own independent 5-bucket breakpoint chain not using antd Grid responsive props at all.

Three unrelated real-time mechanisms coexist with no shared abstraction: Firestore (used ONLY for chat-unread/presence signaling on a single doc shape chats/{setor}/usuarios/{usuario}, never as data-of-record), a raw bidirectional WebSocket (w3cwebsocket) for push notifications, and setInterval REST polling (per-tenant configurable interval, empresa.tempo_atualizacao) for the mission-critical ICU bed board — the most clinically important view is the least real-time of the three.

FormDadosProntuario is a config-driven dynamic clinical-form engine (10 field types, nested groups, nullable sections) instantiated by 14 separate per-role config files (nursing, physio, pharmacy, nutrition, psych, physician, etc.) — the single most reusable/valuable subsystem found, worth preserving as first-class IP.

Dead/orphaned components confirmed via full-repo grep: Breadcrumbs, MobileCardWrapper, and SideFixedButton are fully implemented but have zero import sites anywhere in src; CustomTabs (a bespoke tab bar) coexists with antd Tabs used for the same purpose elsewhere, adopted in only 2 files.

Route-level SSR auth (validateRoute) only checks cookie presence; its permission-check parameter defaults to ignorePermission=true (off) and no call site overrides it — all real authorization gating is client-side via useEffectivePermissions boolean flags.

Design tokens are hand-duplicated between src/styles/variables.less and next.config.js (15 values kept in sync by convention only, no single import path), and the PWA manifest.json still names the product 'teleUTI', evidencing an incomplete historical rebrand to 'Trilhas'.

design.partition: D-03: Clinically relevant UX patterns (alert severity, critical-value highlighting, data density, status color-coding, clinical form UX, real-time patterns)
highlights: Critical clinical values (vitals, labs, SOFA score, fluid balance) have essentially NO threshold-based color coding anywhere in the app — ItemSinaisVitais, InformacoesAssistenciais, ItemIndicadores24h, GridView, and the SOFA tag in FormDadosProntuario all render values with flat/neutral or always-static styling regardless of how abnormal the value is.

The clinical severity palette (statusTrilha.ts: NEUTRO/VERMELHO/AMARELO/LARANJA/ASSISTIDO) is the one real 'design token' system for alerts and is reused consistently across InfoPacienteHeader, CollapseCard, DashboardCard, MessageBallon, ItemNotificacao — but at least 5 other components (handleIconByStatus, HorarioCheck colorCheck, HorarioCheck popover, ItemProtocoloSepse delay flag, DashboardCard occupancy gauge, notification toast) each reimplement their own independent red/green/amber literals instead of importing it.

TabRecomendacoes contains an internal inconsistency: the tab-selector buttons correctly color by each trilha's own alerta, but the criteria content panel directly below is hardcoded to statusTrilha['VERMELHO'] regardless of actual severity.

RenderTagTable exposes a per-cell 'color' prop that looks purpose-built for critical-value/severity encoding in tables, but all 8 real call sites always pass the static brand color 'var(--primary-color)' — the mechanism for cell-level severity coding exists but was never wired to any threshold logic, including in the two fluid-balance tables (ColumnsEntrada/ColumnsSaida) which don't use it at all.

Three independent real-time mechanisms coexist with no shared abstraction: raw WebSocket for notifications, Firestore listeners for chat/presence/video-room roster, and setInterval polling for the main ICU bed grid (ListOcupacoes) — meaning a new alert can appear in the notification bell/toast near-instantly via WebSocket while the primary bed grid showing the same alert lags behind on a polling timer.

Per-tenant white-label theming (--primary-color, set via useChangeColorTheme + dynamic-antd-theme from each company's cor_primaria hex) is cleanly separated from the clinical severity palette, but --warning-color is referenced by Display.tsx and never defined anywhere (LESS or runtime CSS var), silently breaking that variant.

No wizard/stepper (antd Steps) pattern exists anywhere; multi-step clinical data entry is simulated via three uncoordinated mechanisms: collapsible accordion groups with a group-level nullify switch, tabs inside drawers, and sequential drawers — plus a separate sub-group-level conditional-visibility switch, all hand-rolled independently.

Two structurally similar responsive card grids (ListDashboard for sectors, ListOcupacoes for beds) implement different column-span breakpoint sets rather than sharing the centrally defined collapseRule/collapseRuleMobile constants, and ListOcupacoes has an unhandled width gap (2400-2800px) where span becomes undefined.
